title: Funnel Event
description: Ads v1 funnel event contract for raw and cleaned measurement signals before verified revenue linkage.
$comment: Sources: PACK-07 and TECH-07. Funnel events may represent click/comment/inbox/quote/cart/order signals but are not revenue by themselves.

event_source.description: Event source such as ads platform, Facebook Gateway, Commerce Runtime, or verified revenue link. TODO: define official source enum.

clean_event_id.description: Cleaned event identifier after data quality checks.

event_stage.description: Funnel stage. TODO: define official funnel stage enum.

channel_context_id.description: Channel context linked to the event.

quote_snapshot_id.description: QuoteSnapshot reference; not revenue by itself.

cart_id.description: Cart reference; not revenue by itself.

order_id.description: Official order reference; not verified revenue unless verified.
